_meta.note: First version to declare unified corpus identity. One corpus, two parallel tracks, single governing process (P0). FRM is the root. 21 objects: P0 + P1–P14 + MK-P1–MK-P5 + SFW-1.

meta_kaizen.note: ALL PUBLISHED (Zenodo DOIs). Governed by P0. DRP revision pending post-P14 v1.0.

papers.title: Canonical Build Process Standard
papers.note: Governing process for the entire corpus. CBT v2. Endogenous scheduling T_MK. Governs BOTH tracks (S48). T15/T20 open.

papers.title: The Fractal Rhythm Model: A Universal Law of Network Information Transmission
papers.note: β=1/2 proved (Hopf quarter-wave, F-1.4). λ=|α|/(Γ·τ_gen) derived. Γ=1+π²/4. 36-substrate adversarial battery. PH-1.1 resolved S48 via P2 C-2.4. PH-1.2, PH-1.3 resolved S48 via P3 C-3.REG.

papers.title: Derivation and Universality: The β=1/2 Critical Exponent as a Universal Law
papers.note: β=1/2 proved from RG fixed-point, DDE-independent. 10-step derivation, n_invalid=0. 3 substrate classes. TRF-P2-1 (S3), TRF-P2-2 (S10) pre-submission flags. PH-2.3, PH-2.4-EMPIRICAL resolved S48. P10-GAP-2.5 CLOSED S48.

papers.title: FRM Measurement and Diagnostics
papers.note: Standard protocol R1–R9. Zero-free-parameter constraint. Resolves PH-1.2, PH-1.3, PH-2.3, PH-2.4-EMPIRICAL, P10-GAP-2.5. Formal ancestor of P9. IR-12, IR-13.

papers.title: Biological Systems
papers.note: FRM applied to biological oscillators. Full dataset fitting. Receives C-3.REG as measurement standard.

papers.title: Neural and Pharmacological Systems
papers.note: Neural circuits with delayed inhibition. Drug response kinetics. P5↔MK-P4 isomorphism.

papers.title: The Central Paper
papers.note: Integration consistency table for all Act I and Act II claims. Receives C-2.2 as live edge.

papers.title: Climate and Earth Systems
papers.note: Long-timescale delayed feedback networks. ω=π/(2τ_gen) at climate scale. AMOC candidate dataset.

papers.title: Software and Engineered Systems
papers.note: Software deployment feedback cycles. Engineered delayed feedback networks. KVS from MK-P1 governs DORA metrics.

papers.title: Corpus Health and Endogenous Scheduling
papers.note: κ_corpus rubric, Δt_corpus triple, ρ*_corpus. KVS weights from measurement axioms. Endogenous T_MK.

papers.title: MetaKaizen General Theory (Fracttalix context)
papers.note: Theoretical underpinning of what CBT demonstrates operationally. P5↔P10 isomorphism formalised. Bidirectional bridge with MK-P4.

papers.title: Civilisational Dataset Fitting
papers.note: Rome, Han China, Abbasid, British Empire. ω=π/(2·τ_generation) at civilisational scale.

papers.title: Civilisational Sentinel
papers.note: κ_corpus applied to civilisational knowledge networks. Endogenous scheduling at civilisational scale.

papers.title: Corpus Completeness Instrument
papers.note: CORPUS-COMPLETE fires at P13 PHASE-READY. W13 (S36–S39 events → JSON) is on the critical path.

papers.title: Dual Reader Standard (DRP-1)
papers.note: Channel 1 (JSON) / Channel 2 (prose). v1.0 gated on P1 arXiv DOI confirmed.

papers.title: Sentinel v12
papers.note: Corpus health monitoring software. JOSS submission active. 6-month archive risk registered. Implements KVS scoring from MK-P1.

papers.title: Meta-Kaizen: A General Theory and Algorithmic Framework for the Mathematical Formalization of Self-Evolving Continuous Improvement Across Arbitrary Governance Substrates
papers.note: KVS scoring function derived axiomatically from 6 measurement-theoretic axioms. κ=0.50 from Bayesian decision theory.

papers.title: Networked Implementation and Governance Closure Theorems
papers.note: Governance closure for networked KVS. Implementation theorems for distributed knowledge substrates.

papers.title: Reasoning Propagation and Institutional Memory
papers.note: Reasoning propagation across networks. Formal treatment of institutional memory.

papers.title: Closed-Loop Governance: FRM Integration for Regime-Aware Adaptive Governance
papers.note: PRIMARY BRIDGE BETWEEN TRACKS. FRM as regime-detection instrument. T_MK derived from FRM τ_gen via T_char = 4·τ_gen.

papers.title: On the Decision to Act: Formal Framework for Rational Action at System Tipping Points
papers.note: Decision-theoretic capstone. κ=0.50 under asymmetric losses. Framework for when to act at FRM tipping point.

cross_track_frm_to_mk.note: FRM functional form is regime-detection instrument
D-2.1 class criteria define substrate boundary for regime detection
C-3.REG provides τ_gen extraction for governance substrates

cross_track_mk_to_frm.note: KVS is formal basis for CBT improvement prioritisation
κ_corpus is FRM-derived extension of KVS to knowledge networks
P10 is Fracttalix formalisation of MK general theory
Networked KVS → κ_corpus at network level
Institutional memory → confirmation event register component
Confirmation events S36–S39 are MK-P3 memory instances
Asymmetric loss derivation of κ=0.50 threshold

bridge_edges.note: Neural τ_gen ↔ governance τ_gen. Same FRM, different substrate.
Fracttalix MetaKaizen theory ↔ MK FRM governance integration.
Sentinel implements KVS; KVS provides formal scoring basis.
